channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Summer Session 3: More Tutoring Courses Added!
item.description: Wednesdays : 3-8pm (Ballroom, Student Union) Need some support with your summer classes? Drop by your TA’s office hours in the Student Union for extra help or book a one-to-one session with your TA. New tutoring courses added Diff Eq., MAU, Fluid Mechanics, Electronic Instrumentation, Linear Alg., and Eng. Dynamics! Book a One-to-One session with your TA. View the full Drop-In Tutoring Schedule
item.author: Students

item.title: Terminal Lucidity
item.description:
July 23-August 21, 2026 *Contains strobe effects Installation P. Staff

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Community
